title: Nexus Select Trust is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Nexus Select Trust is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Nexus Select Trust in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nexus Select Trust:
Nexus Select Trust is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Select Trust!
